payload.name: isnan
payload.note: UM=+1: NaN is a security concern

deduction.current_formula: 64 operation + (64 * 8 language views) + 256 binary bytes + 13 STIB fields + pairing cards
deduction.new_language_formula: add 64 language-view cards plus N existing pair cards for the new lane
deduction.world_complete_warning: World-complete programming coverage is not deducible yet; this manifest covers the repo-grounded substrate and current language lanes.

design_rule: Substrate card first; language cards are projections, not separate truth sources.
